name: MPE Relaxation Factor Calculator
description: Calculate MPE relaxation factors for scanned beams and diffraction effects

relaxation_types.name: Scanned Beam Relaxation
relaxation_types.applicable_when: Beam is scanned across the eye at sufficient speed

formula.description: MPE for scanned beam considers dwell time

relaxation_types.name: Diffraction Effect Relaxation
relaxation_types.description: Power distributed across multiple beams from gratings or mirror balls
relaxation_types.applicable_when: Beam is split into multiple lower-power beams

formula.description: Power per beam = Total Power / Number of beams

safety_warnings: Relaxation factors require careful verification measurements
Scan failure must be detected within milliseconds
Zero-order beam from diffraction gratings may retain full power
Always include safety margin in calculations

examples.name: Mirror Ball Safety Check
examples.calculation: Power per facet = 50 mW (safe), Zero order = 250 mW (requires assessment)

examples.name: Scanned Beam Assessment
examples.calculation: Effective exposure reduced by scan speed factor
